trickyParts: Keeping the HTML/CSS/JS self-contained in a single TypeScript string template while maintaining readability and proper escaping
deviations: No plan phase existed for this issue — implemented directly from issue spec and dispatch prompt. The issue mentioned broader features (reports, visual artifacts, feedback) but dispatch scoped to MVP: single HTML page with worker status, pipeline, tokens, auto-refresh.
openQuestions: Future iterations could add: interactive feedback (approve/reject plans), report viewing, visual artifact rendering, WebSocket for real-time updates instead of polling
